belier.intro: The Full Moon blazes in Aquarius tonight, illuminating your eleventh house of friendship and collective vision with near total clarity. Saturn and Neptune retrograde together in your own sign keep asking you to separate the dream of who you want to be from the discipline of actually becoming it. The Leo Sun lights your fifth house, so whatever comes to a head tonight arrives wrapped in warmth rather than harshness.
belier.love: A friend group or shared circle reveals something about a relationship that you could not see from inside it. Let the Full Moon's outside perspective land before you react; it is offering information, not judgment.
belier.work: A long-term goal reaches a visible turning point tonight. Saturn retrograde in your first house rewards the version of you that has been quietly disciplined, so notice where patience is finally paying off.
belier.energy: Your fire wants release under this Full Moon, but channel it toward a specific aim rather than scattering it. A brisk walk under tonight's sky settles more than it stirs.
belier.intuition: Neptune retrograde softens your usual directness into something more receptive. Trust the impression that arrives quietly rather than the one that shouts.
belier.mantra: I let the light show me what I already know.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius crests in your tenth house tonight, casting bright and unavoidable light on your public direction and professional reputation. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your twelfth house continue their slower work beneath the surface, dissolving old fears about visibility even as this Moon insists you be seen. The Leo Sun warms your fourth house, keeping home a steady counterweight to whatever culminates in your career tonight.
taureau.love: A partner witnesses a professional achievement or setback tonight and their reaction tells you something true about how they see your ambitions. Let them in rather than managing the moment for them.
taureau.work: Whatever has been building toward recognition or reckoning reaches its peak illumination now. Accept the outcome as information about your path rather than a final verdict on your worth.
taureau.energy: Full Moon nights ask more of earth signs than they admit; ground the intensity through physical movement or time outdoors rather than sitting with it indoors all evening.
taureau.intuition: A private fear surfacing from your twelfth house Saturn and Neptune deserves gentle attention, not dismissal. It is pointing toward an old belief ready to be released.
taureau.mantra: I let my work be seen without needing perfection.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius illuminates your ninth house tonight, bringing a belief, a plan for travel, or a long-held worldview to a moment of full visibility. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your eleventh house continue reshaping which communities and long-term goals actually deserve your continued investment. The Leo Sun in your third house keeps your everyday communication vivid and expressive even as bigger questions come into focus overhead.
gemeaux.love: Differing views on the future, or on what a good life even looks like, surface plainly in a close relationship tonight. Speak your truth without needing the other person to instantly agree with it.
gemeaux.work: A proposal, a course of study, or a broader strategic direction gets full illumination now. Notice what excites you and what quietly exhausts you; both are useful data.
gemeaux.energy: Mental restlessness peaks under this Full Moon. Give your mind a specific question to chew on rather than letting it scatter across everything at once.
gemeaux.intuition: Your sense of which long-term goals still fit who you are becoming is unusually sharp tonight. Trust the goal that still excites you and release the one that has gone quiet.
gemeaux.mantra: I speak my truth and let the future reorganize around it.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius lights your eighth house tonight, bringing shared resources, deep trust, or emotional intensity in a close bond to full visibility. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your tenth house continue quietly restructuring how you define professional success on your own terms rather than inherited ones. The Leo Sun in your own second house keeps your sense of personal worth anchored even as deeper currents surface elsewhere tonight.
cancer.love: An emotional truth that has been building beneath a close relationship reaches full clarity tonight. This Moon favors honesty over comfort, and the honesty, once spoken, tends to bring genuine relief.
cancer.work: A career direction shaped by Saturn's retrograde pressure asks you to let go of a definition of success that was never truly yours. Notice which ambition still feels like home.
cancer.energy: Full Moons intensify your naturally receptive nature; protect your evening with quiet rather than crowds if you can arrange it.
cancer.intuition: Your instincts about what is truly shared versus what is quietly owed in a close bond are unusually accurate under tonight's sky. Trust the number that keeps returning to you.
cancer.mantra: I let what is true surface gently and completely.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius sits directly opposite your Sun tonight, illuminating your seventh house of partnership with unmistakable clarity. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your ninth house continue testing which beliefs about love and commitment are truly yours versus inherited from somewhere else. With the Sun lighting your own sign, you feel this culmination personally, not abstractly.
lion.love: A relationship reaches a moment of full visibility tonight, for better or for more complicated. Whatever surfaces, receive it as the truth the bond needed rather than a threat to survive.
lion.work: A negotiation or professional partnership comes to a head under this opposition. Stay warm even while being direct; your natural generosity is an asset here, not a weakness.
lion.energy: Your fire meets its mirror tonight in the sign directly across from you. Let a partner or close collaborator reflect something back rather than resisting the reflection.
lion.intuition: Your read on where a partnership genuinely stands is sharper than usual under this Full Moon. Trust what you see in someone's actions over what they explain in words.
lion.mantra: I let my relationships show me exactly what they are.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius illuminates your sixth house tonight, bringing questions of daily routine, health, and service to a moment of full visibility. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your eighth house continue their slow dissolution of illusions around shared resources and emotional debts. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house adds a layer of private processing beneath whatever becomes obvious in your everyday life tonight.
vierge.love: A pattern in how you care for a partner, or how they care for you, becomes fully visible tonight. Notice whether the caretaking flows both ways before deciding anything needs to change.
vierge.work: A health habit or work routine that has quietly stopped serving you reaches a point of undeniable clarity. This Full Moon favors adjustment over further tolerance.
vierge.energy: Your body has been signaling something for a while; tonight the signal is loud enough to act on. Rest is not a postponement, it is the correct response.
vierge.intuition: Quiet feelings from your twelfth house Sun surface as physical sensation more than clear thought tonight. Notice where your body holds tension and let that guide you.
vierge.mantra: I adjust what no longer serves my daily wellbeing.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius lights your fifth house tonight, bringing creative work, romance, or self-expression to full and undeniable visibility. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your seventh house continue testing whether a partnership is built on real mutual respect or on an idealized version of the other person. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendship and shared vision a warm backdrop to whatever culminates in your personal expression tonight.
balance.love: A romantic spark or a creative collaboration with someone you care about reaches a clarifying peak tonight. Let joy be the measure of whether to continue, not obligation.
balance.work: A creative project or a passion pursued alongside your main responsibilities gets full illumination now. What you have made deserves to be shown, even if it feels unfinished.
balance.energy: Your air element finds this Full Moon expansive rather than draining; use tonight's clarity to start something rather than only reflect on it.
balance.intuition: Your sense of which relationships bring out your best self is unusually clear under tonight's sky. Trust the person who makes your creativity feel effortless.
balance.mantra: I let my joy guide what I choose to build.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius illuminates your fourth house tonight, bringing home, family, or ancestral patterns into sharp and sometimes uncomfortable focus. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your sixth house continue dissolving illusions about which daily habits actually sustain you. The Leo Sun in your tenth house adds professional visibility to a night otherwise oriented toward the most private corners of your life.
scorpion.love: A family dynamic or domestic pattern affecting a close relationship becomes fully visible tonight. Address it directly rather than letting it simmer beneath the surface any longer.
scorpion.work: Public recognition arrives even as your private world asks for attention; you do not have to choose only one. Let both be true tonight.
scorpion.energy: Your intensity finds a natural outlet in home-based ritual tonight. Clearing a space or cooking a meal channels the Full Moon's charge into something grounding.
scorpion.intuition: Your instincts about your family's true emotional patterns are unusually sharp tonight. What you have sensed for years finally has full evidence behind it.
scorpion.mantra: I face what surfaces at home with honesty and care.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius lights your third house tonight, bringing a conversation, a piece of writing, or a local matter to full and unavoidable clarity. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your fifth house continue asking which creative or romantic pursuits deserve real commitment rather than passing enthusiasm. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps your bigger beliefs warm and expansive even as smaller daily matters demand attention tonight.
sagittaire.love: A conversation you have been circling finally happens tonight, and it goes better than the anticipation suggested. Say the direct thing; this Moon rewards plain speech.
sagittaire.work: A piece of communication, a pitch, or a local project reaches full visibility now. Trust the version you have already refined rather than reaching for one more revision.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire wants to talk tonight more than it wants to move. Let conversation be the outlet rather than forcing physical release.
sagittaire.intuition: Your sense of which creative pursuit still holds real meaning, versus which one you have outgrown, is unusually clear under this sky. Trust the one that still makes you curious.
sagittaire.mantra: I speak plainly and trust the clarity that follows.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius illuminates your second house tonight, bringing your relationship to money, security, and self-worth into full and honest view. Saturn, your own ruling planet, retrograde in your third house continues to demand more disciplined and precise communication than usual. The Leo Sun in your eighth house adds intensity to questions of shared resources even as this Moon focuses your attention on what is truly yours.
capricorne.love: A conversation about shared finances or personal security reaches a clarifying point tonight. State your actual needs plainly rather than around them.
capricorne.work: Your sense of what your work is truly worth becomes undeniable under this Full Moon. If a number has felt wrong for a while, tonight confirms it.
capricorne.energy: Saturn's retrograde discipline serves you well tonight; use the Full Moon's intensity to finish something precise rather than start something new.
capricorne.intuition: Your instincts about your own material worth are unusually accurate under tonight's sky. Trust the number and the boundary it implies.
capricorne.mantra: I name my worth clearly and expect it to be honored.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Full Moon rises in your own sign tonight, an intense and rare moment of full illumination on who you have become over the past six months. Pluto retrograde alongside this Moon in your first house deepens the sense that this culmination is also a transformation, not simply a peak. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your third house keep your thinking precise even as your identity itself takes center stage.
verseau.love: You are more visible than usual tonight, and a partner sees you clearly, perhaps more clearly than you see yourself. Let yourself be witnessed rather than managing the impression.
verseau.work: A personal project or your own reputation reaches a peak of visibility tonight. This is your moment to be seen exactly as you are, not as a polished version.
verseau.energy: This Full Moon in your own sign amplifies everything; channel the intensity into a personal ritual or physical release rather than letting it overwhelm your evening.
verseau.intuition: Your self-knowledge is unusually sharp and unfiltered tonight. Trust the truth about yourself that arrives even if it surprises you.
verseau.mantra: I let myself be fully seen exactly as I am.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Full Moon in Aquarius illuminates your twelfth house tonight, bringing subconscious patterns, dreams, and private processing to an unusually visible peak for such hidden territory. Saturn and Neptune retrograde, with Neptune ruling this very house, continue their long work of dissolving illusions about rest, escape, and spiritual practice. The Leo Sun in your sixth house keeps daily routine a grounding counterweight to tonight's inward intensity.
poissons.love: A private feeling about a relationship that you have not yet spoken aloud becomes impossible to ignore tonight. Consider sharing it gently rather than carrying it alone.
poissons.work: Behind-the-scenes work, research, or quiet preparation reaches a point of clarity tonight even if no one else sees the effort yet. Trust that it will matter soon.
poissons.energy: This Full Moon asks for solitude more than socializing. Honor the pull toward quiet reflection rather than overriding it with obligation.
poissons.intuition: Your access to non-rational knowing peaks dramatically under this configuration. A dream or a sudden image deserves serious attention tonight.
poissons.mantra: I trust what surfaces from my depths tonight.
poissons.author: Sibylle
